---
title: "Lele Liao"
image: "files/Lele_Winter.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:l2liao@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lele-liao-134340/
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/rsm-l2liao
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:l2liao@ucsd.edu
---

Welcome to my website!

## Featured Projects

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-card}
<h3>📊 Churn Prediction</h3>
<p>Predict customer churn using ML models.</p>
<a href="projects/churn-analysis.qmd">View Project →</a>
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-card}
<h3>📊 Housing Market Dashboard</h3>

<p>
Analyze how income impacts housing prices and rental prices across U.S. regions through an interactive Tableau dashboard.
</p>

<a href="projects/HousingMarket/index.html">View Dashboard →</a>
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-card}
<h3>🤖 ML Model Deployment</h3>
<p>End-to-end ML pipeline with deployment.</p>
<a href="projects/ml-deployment.qmd">View Project →</a>
:::
:::

:::
